zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Martha Sothy於1589年出生在英國艾可莎佛朗 瓦爾登時，她的父親Richard Sothy15歲，母親Mary Bentley18歲。她於1619年11月1日與Thomas Pidge在英國艾可莎佛朗 瓦爾登結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1673年2月12日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓洛波利享年84歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州素福爾可波斯頓洛波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Martha Sothy于1589年出生在英国艾可莎佛朗 瓦爾登时，她的父亲Richard Sothy15岁，母亲Mary Bentley18岁。她于1619年11月1日与Thomas Pidge在英国艾可莎佛朗 瓦爾登结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1673年2月12日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓洛波利享年84岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州素福爾可波斯頓洛波利。

nameMeanings.name: Sothy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Him, Chan, Hin, Pok, Roeun, Sarin, Sin, Song.
North German (Söth) and Danish: nickname from Middle Low German sote ‘sweet’.

variants.name: Soder
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Thor, Erik, Hilmer, Sig.  German Erna, Ewald, Hans, Viktor.

German (also Söder): topographic name from Middle High German sōt ‘puddle, wet ground’, Middle Low German sod ‘turf’, the suffix -er denoting an inhabitant, or a habitational name for someone from Söder near Hildesheim, Soden (Hesse, Bavaria), or Sood (Baden-Württemberg).
German (also Söder): topographic name from Middle Low German, Middle High German sōt ‘spring, well, salt spring’.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moira
meanings: Anglicized form of Irish Máire , now used throughout the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: Martha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, of Aramaic rather than Hebrew origin, meaning ‘lady’. It was borne by the sister of Lazarus and Mary of Bethany (John 11:1). According to Luke 10:38, when Jesus visited the house of Mary and Martha, Mary sat at his feet, listening to him, while Martha ‘was cumbered about much serving’, so that she complained to Jesus, ‘Lord, dost thou not care that my sister hath left me to serve alone?’ For this reason, the name Martha has always been associated with hard domestic work, as opposed to the contemplative life.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Martha Sothy was born in 1589, in Saffron Walden, Essex, England, her father, Richard Sothy, was 15 and her mother, Mary Bentley, was 18. She married Thomas Pidge on 1 November 1619, in Saffron Walden, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 12 February 1673, in Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 84, and was buried in Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Martha Sothy est née en 1589, à Saffron Walden, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Richard Sothy, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Mary Bentley, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Pidge le 1 novembre 1619, à Saffron Walden, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 12 février 1673, à Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 84 ans, et a été enterrée à Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Martha Sothy 1589 in Saffron Walden, Essex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Sothy 15 und ihre Mutter Mary Bentley 18. Sie hat am 1. November 1619 in Saffron Walden, Essex, England Thomas Pidge geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 12. Februar 1673 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Martha Sothy è nata il nel 1589 nel Saffron Walden, Essex, England, sua padre, Richard Sothy, aveva 15 anni e sua madre, Mary Bentley, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Pidge il 1 novembre 1619, nel Saffron Walden, Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 12 febbraio 1673, nel Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 84 anni, e fu sepolta a Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Martha Sothyが1589年にイギリスエセックスサフロン ワルデンで生まれた時，父Richard Sothyは15歳，母Mary Bentleyは18歳であった。1619年11月1日にイギリスエセックスサフロン ワルデンでThomas Pidgeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1673年2月12日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクボストンロクスブリーで84歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州スフォルクボストンロクスブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Martha Sothy(이)가 1589년 영국 에세스 사프런 월든에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Sothy(은)는 15세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Bentley(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1619년 11월 1일 영국 에세스 사프런 월든에서 Thomas Pidge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1673년 2월 12일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴 록스버이에서 84세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 수폴크 보스턴 록스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Martha Sothy nasceu em 1589, em Saffron Walden, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Sothy, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Mary Bentley, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Pidge em 1 de novembro de 1619, em Saffron Walden, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 12 de fevereiro de 1673, em Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 84 anos, e foi sepultada em Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Martha Sothy родилась в 1589 г. в местности саффрон валден, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Sothy было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Bentley, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Pidge 1 ноября 1619 г. в местности саффрон валден, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 12 февраля 1673 г. в местности роксбури, бостон, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 84 лет и была похоронена в местности роксбури, бостон, суффолк, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Martha Sothy nació en 1589, en Saffron Walden, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Sothy, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Mary Bentley, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Thomas Pidge el 1 de noviembre de 1619, en Saffron Walden, Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 12 de febrero de 1673, en Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 84 años, y fue sepultada en Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
